stemHtml: You are flying IFR and approach your destination airport in VMC. After experiencing a communication failure…

options.a: Continue the approach, land and report your arrival.
options.b: Make a low approach and wait for visual signals of the ground personnel.
options.c: Squawk 7700 and continue in accordance with the flight plan.
options.d: Continue to the destination aerodrome, adding 500 ft to all the altitudes in the flight plan.
